hero.headline:
Your Vision.
Our Precision.
hero.subheadline: Proxy is a premier post-production house dedicated to transforming raw capture into cinematic mastery. We provide elite finishing services for filmmakers, brands, and agencies who demand the highest industry standards.

intro.title: The Final Polish for World-Class Storytelling
intro.description: The story doesn't end when the cameras stop rolling; it only just begins. At Proxy, we specialize in the art of the finish. From the pacing of the edit to the final audio mix, we handle every technical and creative detail to ensure your project commands attention and delivers an unforgettable audience experience.

about.title: About Proxy
about.description: Proxy is an architecture of visual and auditory perfection. We are a specialized post-production facility built to serve the meticulous demands of high-end commercial, documentary, and narrative projects. We understand that premium projects require more than just technical execution; they require an intuitive understanding of the brand's prestige and the director's intent. We are the invisible hand that elevates good footage into an undeniable masterpiece.
about.mission: To deliver elite, end-to-end post-production services that empower creators and premium brands to captivate their audiences. We are committed to meticulous craftsmanship, ensuring every frame and frequency meets the uncompromising standards of top-tier visual media.
about.vision: To be the definitive post-production partner for world-class creators, consistently setting the benchmark for visual brilliance and audio fidelity in the industry.

allServices.headline: The Proxy Ecosystem: End-to-End Excellence.
allServices.intro: Proxy is a fully integrated creative powerhouse. We bridge the gap between strategic vision and cinematic execution, offering a complete suite of services across production, post-production, advertising, and bespoke studio facilities. Whether you need a comprehensive marketing campaign or the final 4K cinematic color grade for a documentary film, our specialized divisions work in seamless synergy to deliver uncompromised quality.

postProduction.headline: The Final Polish for World-Class Storytelling.
postProduction.intro: The story doesn’t end when the cameras stop rolling; it only just begins. Proxy Post Production is a specialized facility built to serve the meticulous demands of high-end commercial, documentary, and narrative projects. We are the invisible hand that elevates good footage into an undeniable masterpiece.

features.title: Offline & Online Editing
features.desc: Shaping the narrative flow. We meticulously carve out the story, focusing on pacing, emotional resonance, and a flawless transition to the final high-resolution master.

features.title: Color Grading
features.desc: Sculpting with light and tone. From gritty documentary realism to hyper-stylized cinematic colors, we ensure absolute color fidelity and visual consistency across every 4K frame.

features.title: Visual Effects (VFX)
features.desc: Seamless illusions and enhancements. Our pipeline integrates digital elements flawlessly into live-action plates, maintaining the authentic, high-quality feel of your original cinematography.

features.title: Audio MIX
features.desc: Immersive sound design. We deliver crisp, spatial audio mixes—from balanced musical scores to crystal-clear dialogue—ensuring your project is heard exactly as intended.

production.headline: Bringing Bold Visions to the Screen.
production.intro: Proxy Production turns ambitious concepts into tangible reality. We handle the physical execution of your creative vision with precision, assembling top-tier crews and utilizing industry-leading equipment to capture every moment flawlessly.

features.title: Commercial Production
features.desc: High-impact visual storytelling designed to elevate brands and captivate target audiences.

features.title: Documentary Film Production
features.desc: Authentic, compelling, and beautifully shot narratives that explore real-world subjects with cinematic depth.

features.title: Corporate & Brand Films
features.desc: Translating your company's core mission into engaging, premium video assets.

features.title: On-Set Execution
features.desc: Full-service physical production management, from location scouting and set design to directing and cinematography.

advertising.headline: Strategic Creativity. Measurable Impact.
advertising.intro: Proxy Advertising is your dedicated marketing and brand strategy arm. We don't just create beautiful visuals; we build the strategic foundation that ensures those visuals drive results. We partner with brands to craft compelling identities and multi-channel campaigns that command market share.

features.title: Brand Identity & Graphic Design
features.desc: Crafting comprehensive visual identities, from custom logo design to complete brand guidelines and premium marketing presentations.

features.title: Campaign Strategy
features.desc: Developing targeted advertising strategies that connect with your audience across digital, social, and traditional media.

features.title: Digital Presence
features.desc: Designing and deploying integrated online ecosystems, including tailored e-commerce solutions and responsive web experiences.

features.title: Content Marketing
features.desc: Producing a consistent stream of high-quality, on-brand content designed to engage and convert.

exclusive.headline: Bespoke Solutions for Elite Partnerships.
exclusive.intro: Proxy Exclusive is our white-glove, VIP tier reserved for highly confidential, bespoke, or uniquely complex projects. This division provides dedicated resources, priority scheduling, and an unmatched level of personalized service.

features.title: Dedicated Creative Teams
features.desc: A hand-picked team of our senior talent assigned solely to your project from inception to final delivery.

features.title: Uncompromising Confidentiality
features.desc: Strict NDA protocols and secure, closed-network workflows for sensitive intellectual property and unreleased campaigns.

features.title: Concierge Project Management
features.desc: 24/7 availability and direct access to department heads, ensuring your feedback is implemented instantly.

features.title: Private Screenings
features.desc: Access to our premium, calibrated screening rooms to review your 4K masters in the perfect viewing environment.

studio.headline: Your Canvas for Creation.
studio.intro: Proxy Studio provides the physical space and the technical infrastructure necessary to execute at the highest level. Our facilities are designed by creatives, for creatives, offering an inspiring and technically flawless environment for your next shoot or session.

features.title: Soundstages & Green Screens
features.desc: Acoustically treated, fully controllable environments ready for complex lighting setups and VFX plate shoots.

features.title: Equipment Rental
features.desc: Access to an in-house arsenal of premium cinema cameras, high-end lenses, and advanced lighting gear.

features.title: Creative Workspaces
features.desc: Comfortable, client-facing suites and production offices designed for collaboration and focus.

features.title: Vocal & Foley Booths
features.desc: Isolated recording environments for pristine voiceover, ADR, and custom sound design capture.

contact.title: Let's Finalize Your Masterpiece
contact.subtitle: Ready to elevate your next production? Connect with our team to discuss your project requirements, timelines, and post-production workflow.
contact.locationText: 123 Cinematic Way, Suite 100, Post City, PC 90210
